drop_reason: Original open-weight model files unavailable for reproducible open-ended rerun at 50 languages
key_findings: Declarative-generative gap: 9 models show positive gap (forced-choice alignment exceeds free-form alignment), 7 show negative. All 5 commercial flagships positive; all 5 open-weight models negative.
Gap direction splits perfectly by model type: commercial flagships avg +0.31, open-weight avg -0.20. If question format caused the gap, all models would go the same direction.
SAS ranking stable across recomputed R-bar (Spearman > 0.99 vs prior formula). Top 5 and bottom 5 unchanged.
limitations: Tested from EU/US network endpoints; API behavior from Russian IPs not verified.
temp=0 does not guarantee determinism across all providers; seed=42 used where supported.
2 open-weight models (OLMo-3, SmolLM-3) dropped due to model file irreproducibility. Llama 4 rerun via OpenRouter (Scout).
